comment: Per-engagement Burp Pro defaults. Loaded by the operator when starting a new engagement. Enforces a global rate + concurrency cap that applies to every agent whose traffic is proxied through Burp (see HTTPS_PROXY env + Chromium --proxy-server in ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json).
notes: Apply these settings via Burp Pro UI once per engagement: User options -> Connections -> Resource pools.
burp-gate.sh halt-all replaces the scope with an empty include + catch-all exclude to drop traffic.
burp-gate.sh resume-all restores the include pattern above.
